title: Crunchy Cornbread Bites
description: A crispy twist on the classic cornbread, perfect for a snack or side dish.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together the cornmeal, crushed crisps, and a pinch of salt.
In a separate bowl, mix together the melted with and chopped pickles.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and stir until just combined.
Spoon the mixture into a mini muffin tin.
Bake for 12-15 minutes, or until the edges are lightly golden.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
